nasb.text: Those who hate the Lord would pretend obedience to Him, And their time of punishment would be forever.

esv.text: Those who hate the Lord would cringe toward him, and their fate would last forever.

cnv.text: 憎恨耶和華的人必向他假意歸順， 他們的刑期必永無止境。

ccb.text: 憎恶我的人要在我面前屈膝投降，永远沉沦。

csbs.text: 恨耶和华的人将向他卑躬屈膝， 愿他们受罚的日子直到永远。
